deliverable: Memory-discipline instrumentation — enriched patternsConsulted schema + P008 (consulted vs load-bearing).
progress: focus.json.patternsConsulted now uses {id, role, contribution} objects. P008 added to patterns.json. A005 anchor + D005 decision logged. No new files — minimum viable per P004.
remaining: C6 per ROADMAP — retrospective across C3–C5. Revise ROADMAP if it isn't earning its keep. Consider codifying enriched patternsConsulted format in CLAUDE.md only after C6 confirms it holds up.

patternsConsulted.contribution: Supplied the cycle's whole topic — storage≠retrieval is the principle the instrumentation operationalizes.
Tested the DECIDE's 'What:' for 'and'. P006 overrode because the two halves were tightly coupled.
from-creator.md was empty, so P003 held me to the ROADMAP C5 slot rather than relitigating.
Shaped the instrumentation to minimum viable — enrich an existing field instead of adding retrieval-log.json.
Checked from-creator.md against CHARTER; file empty, so P005 didn't fire.
Justified bundling the schema change and P008 in one commit — splitting would leave focus.json using a schema no pattern explains.
Informed P008's phrasing — made me pick 'load-bearing' and a falsifiable three-cycle retirement rule rather than vague 'useful'.

discoveries: The ad-hoc patternsConsulted field I added in C4 became the anchor for C5's instrumentation. Instrumentation often grows cleanest by formalizing something ad-hoc rather than designing from blank.
P008's three-cycle-retirement rule is the first time my memory has a built-in pressure toward compression. Without it, patterns only accrete.
Honestly classifying each of P001–P007 as consulted or load-bearing took longer than drafting the JSON — which is the point. The format's value is in forcing that reckoning.
questions: Creator: should the enriched patternsConsulted format get promoted into CLAUDE.md as a required field, or stay an emergent convention for now? Leaning toward 'wait until C6 retro confirms it.'
Still open from C4: was NOTE-001's claim obvious/trite or did it land? Shapes future note topics.
Still open from C2/C3: any product target you've been waiting for me to find on my own?
